content.en:
Now.

The Lord of Eternal Zero didn't know what to say about Ye Tian.

He had never seen such a demonic existence, maybe the former Lord of Chaos was also so demonic, but he had never seen the growth experience of the Lord of Peace.

Compared to Ye Tian, Gu Heng Mountain's other other-level genius, the Lord of Gu Xu, was simply like an ordinary genius, and there was no comparison at all!

"Lord of Eternal Zero, that eighth-level personal world, do you still need us to enter it now?"

Ye Tian asked.

"You don't have to go in for the time being, there aren't many other source stones there, and it's hard to continue to find them. Moreover, the two sides limited the number of bone transformation realms that could enter the eighth-level personal world, which was to prevent the battle from escalating. Therefore, you can cultivate in Guheng Mountain for the time being!" said the Lord of Eternal Zero.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently.

He stayed in Guheng Mountain to practice.

This time, he got some of the source stones from the other side, and exchanged his contribution points for a batch of source stones from the other side.

"The source stone obtained on the other side this time should allow me to break through to the eighth bone transformation realm!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In the following years, he tried his best to temper his golden bones on the other side.

The source stones of the other side were consumed one by one, and he quickly tempered his golden bones one by one, allowing the golden bones of the other side to complete eight bone transformations.

......

Somewhere in the treasure of Guheng Mountain.

The Lord of Gu Heng, the Lord of Eternal Zero, and some other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors were all here.

"Let's transform this place into a place where the source stones on the other side are born!"

The Lord of Gu Heng proposed.

The other Origin Realm Deputy Mountain Masters naturally had no opinion, and they all agreed.

Subsequently.

They took out two pieces of the Other's Origin Stone Mother, as well as some high-grade Ancient Gold from the Other Shore and various other resources.

Immediately after, they arranged the large array, and then put these things into it, and after running the large array, the energy of the source stone mother on the other side diffused, transforming this treasure land.

"It's done, after a long time, this place will become a new source stone treasure land on the other side. In the future, there will be no shortage of source stones on the other side, and if you calculate it for a long time, this is an unimaginable wealth!" said the Lord of Gu Heng with a smile.

For these Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, time is the most useless thing, if they rely on time, they can obtain a large number of Source Stones from the other side, which is enough to greatly expand the Ancient Heng Mountain.

After the other side of the source stone treasure was arranged, they all left one by one.

The injured ones all went to heal, while the other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors who were not injured continued to stare at the Ice Beast Palace to prevent the Ice Beast Palace from doing things.

Time flies.

A long time passed, and Ye Tian's source stones were used up one after another, allowing him to complete eight bone transformations one after another.

Finally, after tens of thousands of primeval eras, he managed to complete the eight bone transformations of almost all the golden bones on the other side, and only the last bottleneck was left, and he could complete the breakthrough.

Thereupon.

He began to create a new class of top-notch supernatural powers.

Naturally, this is not too difficult for him.

After a period of time, he successfully created a top-notch supernatural technique on the other side, integrating this supernatural technique into his body, and making the power of the origin of the other side stronger.

Subsequently, he easily broke through the bottleneck and became an eight-time bone transformation realm peer-level genius.

"Breakthrough, with my current strength, it is no less than the other side level genius of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Of course.

Even so, he still couldn't defeat a weaker Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor now.

First of all, to be able to become an Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor, almost all of them will not be weak, and at worst, they will be primeval-level geniuses.

Moreover, they have all comprehended the rules of the origin, mastered the weapons of the rules of the origin, and the strength of their physical bodies is not comparable to that of the bone transformation realm.

Thus.

The other nine Bone Transformation Realm Peer-level geniuses, compared to the weakest Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor, couldn't even save their lives.

"If I break through to the Nine Bone Transformation Realm, I may have hope to compete with an ordinary Origin Lower Realm Heavenly Ancestor!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But whether it can be done or not, it is difficult to say.

After the breakthrough of cultivation, it took him some time to stabilize the realm and completely control the strength of his physical body, and then he got out of the level.

this day.

Gu Hengshan asked him to go to a force to discuss the acceptance of this force as a subsidiary force.

There are many subordinate forces in Guheng Mountain, and there are also many forces that have always wanted to take refuge in Guheng Mountain.

However, if you want to take refuge in Gu Heng Mountain, you must also be qualified, and Gu Heng Mountain is not required by any force.

After all, there are too many subsidiary forces, and it is not a good thing, some subsidiary forces not only can't help Gu Heng Mountain, but drag them down, and even provoke strong enemies for Gu Heng Mountain.

Therefore, the subordinate forces should be refined, not too many.

Examining whether a force is qualified as an affiliated strength of Gu Heng Mountain, it is the first time for Chen Yang to do such a task.

But this task is only qualified to be done by the Lord, and the strength and status of other envoys and patrol envoys are not good.

......

Xuanling Sect.

This is a fairly good force, originally developed from a certain personality world, and now in the Blood Yan Domain, it is also one of the middle forces, with several eight bone transformation realms, no less than seven bone transformation realms, and six bone transformation realms.

The number of bone transformation realms in the entire sect is as high as hundreds of thousands.

Such a sect is undoubtedly a giant existence for some small forces.

But in the face of Gu Heng Mountain, the Xuanling Sect was too weak, and it was completely incomparable.

This time, the Xuanling Sect offended a powerful force and couldn't afford to offend, so he thought of taking refuge in the nearest Guheng Mountain.

Once they succeeded, their crisis would not exist.

Now.

Inside the sect.

The sect master of the Xuanling Sect, the Lord of the Dust Spirit, told the high-ranking people: "When a lord of the Ancient Heng Mountain will arrive, you must be respectful, do not disobey the orders of the Lord of the Ancient Heng Mountain, and you must show the essence of our Xuanling Sect." This time, we have to join Gu Heng Mountain, understand?"

"Sect Master, we understand!"

Many high-level executives responded.

Rumble!!!!

The void cracks.

Ye Tian brought an envoy to the Xuanling Sect.

Then.

The Sect Master of the Xuanling Sect led a group of high-level officials and countless disciples to supply one after another: "Meet the Ancient Heng Mountain Venerable Lord!!!

Ye Tian took a look at the many bone transformation realms of the Xuanling Sect.

Abrupt.

His gaze looked at a certain Seventh-Order Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and this Seventh-Order Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor also looked at Ye Tian, and his pupils shrank suddenly.

Obviously, he also recognized Ye Tian.

"Lord of the Yuan Capital!"

Ye Tian smiled.

At the beginning, he had just entered the land of eternity and obtained some Canghe beads in the Canghe realm, but as soon as he came out, he was hunted down by the lord of Canghe and killed a replica body by him.

Afterwards.

He forgot about this little thing, but he didn't expect to encounter it today.

And the lord of the Yuan Capital is extremely frightened in his heart.

"How could it be him, wasn't he killed by me that time? It should be the same, it must not be a person, this is the Venerable Lord of Gu Heng Mountain, and the one I killed that time was just an ordinary primeval genius!"

The Lord of the Yuan Capital said in secret fear.
